tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years building scalable web platforms across React, Angular, Vue.js, TypeScript, Java, Python, and AWS. Delivered event-driven services at 99.99% reliability and cut production issue resolution by 40%. Skilled in JavaScript, CSS, Sass, REST/GraphQL APIs, and test automation with Jest and Cypress, driving UX-focused product development.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected scalable backend services with Python and Java Spring Boot microservices, enabling modular, independently deployable platform components.
Built responsive Angular single-page applications in TypeScript, JavaScript, Sass, and LESS with Reactive Forms and lazy loading for a clean, UX-focused interface.
Engineered RESTful and GraphQL APIs consumed by Angular and React frontends, ensuring seamless full-stack integration across products.
Developed Python data processing pipelines and automation code, reducing manual operational effort by ~50% and improving processing efficiency.
Optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and data models across relational and NoSQL databases, improving reporting and transaction performance by 35%.
Engineered high-throughput event-driven systems using DynamoDB Streams, Lambda, and SNS/SQS, ensuring 99.99% reliability.
Deployed cloud-native applications on AWS (Lambda, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS) and added Jest and Cypress test suites, raising frontend coverage to ~90%.
Implemented monitoring with Splunk and Spring Boot Actuator, reducing production issue resolution time by 40%.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed backend applications in Python, Java Spring Boot, and Node.js, delivering scalable RESTful APIs and microservices.
Built dynamic frontend applications in Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, SCSS, and CSS, creating reusable components and class-based state management for complex UI workflows.
Configured Webpack bundling and wrote Jest unit tests, cutting build size ~25% and improving frontend development velocity.
Designed and optimized SQL queries, joins, views, and stored procedures, improving API response times by 35%.
Implemented event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka, reducing inter-service dependency failures by 35%.
Created and documented RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Swagger/OpenAPI, enforcing versioning and backward compatibility.
Integrated authentication using OAuth2, JWT, and Spring Security, and applied Redis caching to improve throughput under heavy load.
Automated infrastructure with Terraform on AWS and GCP and containerized apps with Docker and Kubernetes, improving CI/CD efficiency.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Angular frontends and Python/Java backend services, gaining broad full-stack development experience.
Built Angular modules in TypeScript, JavaScript, and CSS with Redux and Reactive Forms for responsive, UX-driven interfaces.
Built and optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and relational schemas, improving query execution time by 20% across MySQL and MongoDB.
Developed RESTful APIs and documented service contracts using Swagger/OpenAPI, securing endpoints with OAuth2 and Spring Security.
Applied rate limiting and API gateway protections to safeguard backend services and data.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using JUnit, Jest, and Python-based test automation tools.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University Of North Carolina At Charlotte

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate - AWS Academy Data Engineering
